---
title: "Opening Performance"
subtitle: "Which openings work best for you?"
---

```{r setup}
source(here::here("R", "functions.R"))
library(DT)
con <- get_site_db()
player_moves <- load_site_player_moves(con)
games <- load_site_games(con)
```

## Top Openings by Accuracy

```{r opening-table}
opening_perf <- calculate_opening_performance(player_moves %>% filter(is_player_move))

opening_perf %>%
  select(ECO = eco_code, Opening = opening_name, Accuracy = accuracy,
         `Avg CP Loss` = avg_cp_loss, Games = n_games, Moves = n_moves) %>%
  mutate(Accuracy = round(Accuracy, 1), `Avg CP Loss` = round(`Avg CP Loss`, 1)) %>%
  datatable(
    options = list(pageLength = 15, order = list(list(2, "desc"))),
    rownames = FALSE,
    class = "compact stripe"
  ) %>%
  formatStyle("Accuracy",
    background = styleColorBar(range(opening_perf$accuracy), "#b58863"),
    backgroundSize = "98% 88%",
    backgroundRepeat = "no-repeat",
    backgroundPosition = "center"
  )
```

## Opening Accuracy Chart

```{r opening-chart}
top_openings <- opening_perf %>%
  head(15) %>%
  mutate(
    label = ifelse(nchar(opening_name) > 30, paste0(substr(opening_name, 1, 27), "..."), opening_name)
  )

plot_ly(top_openings, x = ~accuracy, y = ~reorder(label, accuracy), type = "bar",
        orientation = "h",
        marker = list(color = ~accuracy, colorscale = list(c(0, "#b58863"), c(1, "#f0d9b5"))),
        text = ~sprintf("%.1f%% (%d games)", accuracy, n_games),
        textposition = "outside",
        hovertemplate = "%{y}<br>Accuracy: %{x:.1f}%<br>Games: %{customdata}<extra></extra>",
        customdata = ~n_games) %>%
  layout(
    title = list(text = "Top 15 Openings by Accuracy", font = list(color = "#f0d9b5")),
    xaxis = list(title = "Accuracy (%)", range = c(0, 105), gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    yaxis = list(title = "", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(color = "#adb5bd"),
    margin = list(l = 200)
  )
```

## Win Rate by Opening

```{r win-rate}
win_rates <- games %>%
  filter(!is.na(eco_code)) %>%
  mutate(
    player_color = ifelse(tolower(white_username) == tolower(SITE_USERNAME), "white", "black"),
    player_result = case_when(
      result == "1-0" & player_color == "white" ~ "Win",
      result == "0-1" & player_color == "black" ~ "Win",
      result == "1/2-1/2" ~ "Draw",
      TRUE ~ "Loss"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(eco_code, opening_name) %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    wins = sum(player_result == "Win"),
    draws = sum(player_result == "Draw"),
    losses = sum(player_result == "Loss"),
    win_rate = wins / total * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(total >= 3) %>%
  arrange(desc(win_rate))

win_rates %>%
  head(20) %>%
  select(ECO = eco_code, Opening = opening_name, Games = total,
         Wins = wins, Draws = draws, Losses = losses, `Win %` = win_rate) %>%
  mutate(`Win %` = round(`Win %`, 1)) %>%
  datatable(
    options = list(pageLength = 15, order = list(list(6, "desc"))),
    rownames = FALSE,
    class = "compact stripe"
  )
```

## Repertoire — White vs Black

```{r repertoire-split}
repertoire <- games %>%
  filter(!is.na(opening_name)) %>%
  mutate(
    player_color = ifelse(tolower(white_username) == tolower(SITE_USERNAME), "White", "Black")
  ) %>%
  group_by(player_color, eco_code, opening_name) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(player_color) %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 10) %>%
  ungroup()

plot_ly(repertoire, x = ~n, y = ~reorder(opening_name, n), type = "bar",
        orientation = "h", color = ~player_color,
        colors = c("White" = "#f0d9b5", "Black" = "#b58863"),
        hovertemplate = "%{y}<br>Games: %{x}<extra></extra>") %>%
  layout(
    title = list(text = "Most Played Openings by Color", font = list(color = "#f0d9b5")),
    xaxis = list(title = "Games Played", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    yaxis = list(title = "", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    barmode = "group",
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(color = "#adb5bd"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15),
    margin = list(l = 200)
  )
```

```{r cleanup}
disconnect_db(con)
```
